summary: Tested Ship-To Address & Place of Supply (POS) feature for CGST/IGST determination. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: shipping address radio options, ship-to form with GST verification, state field locking, and submit validation.

minor.issue: Sandbox.co.in API returns 'Invalid GSTIN pattern' for some valid GSTINs (e.g., 27AAACR5055K1Z6). This is external API behavior, not a code bug. The Locofast GSTIN (07AADCL8794N1ZM) works correctly.

seed_data_creation: Created test credit wallets during backend tests with GSTINs: 27TEST*, 27NOSP*, 27POSG*, 27INTR*, 27IGST*, 27INVS*, 27INVN*, 27GETS* (all cancelled/cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ship-To Address & POS feature fully tested. Key flows verified: (1) ShipTo Pydantic model accepts name, company, gst_number, address, city, state, pincode, phone fields. (2) Order creation with ship_to via credit path persists ship_to on order document. (3) _resolve_pos_state function correctly prioritizes: ship_to.gst_number > ship_to.state > customer.gst_number > customer.state. (4) Invoice PDF generation includes Ship To block when ship_to is provided, with GSTIN line and State Code line. (5) Tax Type on invoice correctly shows CGST+SGST for intra-state (ship state = seller state 07 Delhi) and IGST for inter-state. (6) Frontend: After billing GST verification, 'GST Registered Address' and 'Ship to a Different Address' radio options appear. (7) Clicking 'Ship to a Different Address' shows ship-to form with amber warning banner about GST requirement. (8) Ship-to form has all required fields: ship-gst-input, ship-name-input, ship-address-input, ship-city-input, ship-state-input, ship-pincode-input, ship-phone-input. (9) Entering valid 15-char GSTIN in ship-gst-input triggers verification, auto-fills firm name + address + city + state + pincode. (10) State field becomes readOnly after successful shipping GST verification with '🔒 locked from GSTN' indicator. (11) Submit without verifying ship GST while 'different address' selected shows toast 'Please verify the consignee GST for the shipping address'. Note: Sandbox.co.in GST API is rate-limited and rejects some valid GSTINs - use 07AADCL8794N1ZM for testing.

ship_to_model.details: ShipTo Pydantic model with all required fields (name, company, gst_number, address, city, state, pincode, phone)

order_create_with_ship_to.details: Order creation via credit path persists ship_to on order document

order_create_without_ship_to.details: Order creation without ship_to sets ship_to to null

pos_resolver_priority.details: _resolve_pos_state correctly prioritizes ship_to.gst_number > ship_to.state > customer.gst_number > customer.state

intra_state_cgst_sgst.details: When shipping to same state as seller (Delhi 07), invoice shows CGST+SGST

inter_state_igst.details: When shipping to different state than seller, invoice shows IGST

gst_verify_endpoint.details: /api/gst/verify endpoint works correctly (Sandbox API may reject some GSTINs)

invoice_with_ship_to.details: Invoice PDF includes Ship To block with GSTIN and State Code when ship_to is provided

invoice_without_ship_to.details: Invoice PDF generated correctly without Ship To block when ship_to is null

frontend_radio_options.details: 'GST Registered Address' (data-testid='ship-addr-same') and 'Ship to a Different Address' (data-testid='ship-addr-different') radio options appear after billing GST verification

frontend_ship_to_form.details: Ship-to form (data-testid='ship-to-different-form') appears with amber warning banner and all required fields

frontend_ship_gst_verify.details: Entering valid GSTIN in ship-gst-input triggers verification, shows green checkmark, auto-fills address fields

frontend_state_lock.details: State field becomes readOnly after shipping GST verification with '🔒 locked from GSTN' indicator

frontend_submit_validation.details: Submit without verifying ship GST shows toast 'Please verify the consignee GST for the shipping address'
